parsedObject.productTitle: AI-Powered Social Media Content Calendar Template Pack
parsedObject.listingTitle: AI Social Media Content Calendar Template Pack | Boost Engagement Effortlessly
parsedObject.shortDescription: Save time and boost your social media engagement with this AI-powered content calendar template pack. Perfect for busy small business owners and freelancers.
parsedObject.priceSuggestion: Based on similar template packs and the value provided, a price between $19 and $49 would be appropriate. I will start with $29.
parsedObject.description:
Tired of staring at a blank content calendar? This AI-Powered Social Media Content Calendar Template Pack is designed to eliminate your content creation stress and skyrocket your online engagement. Created specifically for busy small business owners and freelancers who are short on time but big on ambition, this pack provides you with ready-to-use templates infused with AI-driven insights.

Stop guessing what your audience wants. Our templates are structured to help you generate compelling post ideas, craft attention-grabbing captions, and plan your social media strategy for weeks in advance. You'll gain clarity on your content pillars, discover trending topics relevant to your niche, and maintain a consistent, professional online presence without the overwhelm. 

By using this pack, you will: 
- Save hours each week on content planning and ideation.
- Increase your social media engagement rates through data-informed content suggestions.
- Maintain a consistent and professional brand voice across all platforms.
- Reduce the mental load of social media marketing and focus on growing your business.

This is your secret weapon to effortless and effective social media marketing. Get started today and transform your content strategy!
bullets: Save hours on content planning and ideation with AI-driven prompts.
Boost engagement with targeted post ideas and caption templates.
Maintain a consistent brand voice across all your social platforms.
Reduce social media marketing overwhelm for small business owners and freelancers.
Includes templates for daily, weekly, and monthly content planning.
Easy-to-use and customizable for any niche.
parsedObject.publishInstructions: Go to Gumroad, create a new product, paste the listing title and description, upload the AI-Powered Social Media Content Calendar Template Pack file, set the price to $29, and publish.
parsedObject.fileContent: This file would contain the actual template pack, likely in a format like Google Sheets, Excel, or a PDF guide detailing how to use the AI prompts for content creation. For this JSON output, we represent it as a placeholder.

parsedObject.listingTitle: AI Social Media Content Calendar Template Pack | Boost Engagement
parsedObject.shortDescription: Effortlessly plan your social media with AI-generated content ideas. Save time and increase engagement for your small business or freelance clients.
parsedObject.priceSuggestion: Consider a price range of $15-$25 based on perceived value and competitor pricing for template packs.
parsedObject.description:
Struggling to keep your social media fresh and engaging? This AI-Powered Social Media Content Calendar Template Pack is designed for busy small business owners and freelancers who want to streamline their content creation process. Stop staring at a blank screen and start posting consistently with AI-generated ideas tailored for maximum impact. 

This pack provides you with a structured yet flexible template to plan your posts weeks in advance. Simply input your business type and target audience, and let AI spark creative post ideas, caption starters, and relevant hashtags. You'll save hours of brainstorming time each week, ensuring a consistent online presence that attracts and retains customers. Boost your engagement rates, build brand authority, and focus on what you do best – running your business. Perfect for those new to social media marketing or looking to optimize their existing strategy without a huge budget or learning curve.
bullets: Generate unique content ideas with AI prompts
Plan your social media calendar weeks ahead
Save hours of content brainstorming time
Increase social media engagement and visibility
Easy-to-use template for any business type
Includes caption starters and hashtag suggestions
parsedObject.publishInstructions: Go to Gumroad, create new product, paste title and description, upload the template files, set price to $19.99, and publish.
parsedObject.fileContent:
This template pack is a digital download. Upon purchase, customers will receive a PDF document containing:

1.  **AI Prompt Guide:** A curated list of AI prompts designed to generate diverse social media content ideas based on business niche, target audience, and marketing goals.
2.  **Content Calendar Template (Spreadsheet Format):** A downloadable spreadsheet with columns for Date, Time, Platform, Content Type, AI-Generated Idea, Caption Starter, Hashtags, and Status.
3.  **Usage Guide:** Simple instructions on how to best utilize the prompts and template to maximize results.
